authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(171) — Yuba River, North Fork (Sierra and Yuba Cos.)
sources.quotedText: (171) Yuba River, North Fork (Sierra and Yuba Cos.) from the western boundary of Sierra City to the confluence with Ladies Canyon Creek. All year. Only artificial lures may be used. 2 trout

sources.title: The North Fork of The Yuba River Guide
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW
sources.quotedText: R2 Sierra Yuba River North Fork Rainbow Trout Sub-catchable Put and Grow April-October; R2 Sierra Yuba River North Fork, Downieville Rainbow Trout Catchable Put and Take April-November

regulations.humanSummary: Open to fishing all year from the western boundary of Sierra City to the confluence with Ladies Canyon Creek

parameters.note: Only artificial lures may be used (no barbless-hook requirement stated for this segment, unlike many other special-regulation waters).

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: The table entry sets a 2-trout daily bag limit; per 14 CCR 7.50(a) unless otherwise provided it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit, so the possession limit also equals 2.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag and possession limit

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document lists 'Yuba River North Fork' (Region 2, Sierra Co.) as receiving Sub-catchable Rainbow Trout under the Put and Grow program, release month range April-October. This is a provisional plan; CDFW's execution is not guaranteed.

CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document separately lists 'Yuba River North Fork, Downieville' (Region 2, Sierra Co.) as receiving Catchable-size Rainbow Trout under the Put and Take program, release month range April-November. This is a provisional plan; CDFW's execution is not guaranteed.
